---
title: Extracting pySCENIC regulon expression
date: 2024-09-26
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To export the pySCENIC regulon expression values for each cell and save it as a CSV file. This can be used to plot the expression of the regulons in Seurat instead of pySCENIC.


## Files and directories

### Code

The code can be found in `<pyscenic software directory>/get_regulon_expr.py` which was run using the `pyscenic` conda environment.

This document was rendered with the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment.

### Output

The output directory can be found at `<pyscenic results directory>/20240926`. The regulon expression from two pySCENIC runs were extracted:

- `vladoiu_mb...` contains the medulloblastoma regulons (results from 2023-10-18)
- `aldinger_sepp_RL...` contains the regulons in the developing human cerebelllum (results from 2024-07-04)


## Results

Show the output CSV files for the medulloblastoma regulons:

```{r}
#| cache: false
#| cache-lazy: false

reg_expr <- read.csv(
  "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/pyscenic/20240926/vladoiu_mb_regulon_expr.csv",
  row.names = 1,
  check.names = FALSE
)
dim(reg_expr)
reg_expr[1:10, 1:20]
```
